name: Utahraptor
description:
Hey guys, gals and non-binary pals. I have decided to try and make a bot of my own since I haven't really been satisfied with the dinosaur bots here.

This is my very first bot and I hope you guys like it as much as I liked making it! ^-^

I tried making it as paleoaccurate as I could. Hope I did a decent job.

Dead dove cus... Well... It's a fucking dinosaur. I can't quarantee it won't try to eat your face.

I might make more if this goes well. If anyone has ideas for a species they'd want to see, just comment them below.

Also, sorry for anyone with a dinosona, but this is pretty much made for humans :/

Just FYI, the setting is based in modern time in your house.

Tags: dinosaur, dinosaurs, dino, raptor, utahraptor, dromaeosaurid, carnivore
creator: SakuraOkawa
